meta.title: YOUR_COMPANY_NAME — Enterprise Software for Modern Business
meta.description: Build, scale, and automate your enterprise operations. Trusted by hundreds of B2B teams worldwide.

site.name: YOUR_COMPANY_NAME
site.description: Build, scale, and automate your enterprise operations.

hero.headline: The Platform Your Business Deserves.
hero.subheadline: Stop stitching together point solutions. Our integrated platform gives your team a single source of truth — from day one.

features.title: Everything You Need to Operate at Scale
features.subtitle: Six core capabilities that work together to accelerate your business.

items.title: Real-Time Operations
items.description: Monitor every process, workflow, and KPI as it happens. Get instant alerts when performance deviates from targets.

items.title: Enterprise Security
items.description: Bank-grade encryption, role-based access control, and SOC 2 Type II compliance built in from the start.

items.title: Global & Multi-Site
items.description: Manage teams and locations across time zones from a single, unified dashboard. No per-site licenses.

items.title: Advanced Analytics
items.description: Turn raw data into actionable insight. Customizable dashboards, scheduled reports, and AI-driven recommendations.

items.title: API-First Integration
items.description: Connect to your existing ERP, CRM, or any third-party system via our REST API. No rip-and-replace required.

items.title: Collaboration Tools
items.description: Shared workspaces, real-time commenting, and permission-aware views for every team member — from the floor to the C-suite.

stats.title: Trusted by Teams Just Like Yours

cta.headline: Ready to Transform Your Operations?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of enterprise teams who replaced spreadsheets and siloed tools with a single, intelligent platform.

contact.title: Book Your Demo
contact.subtitle: Fill out the form and our team will reach out within 24 hours to schedule a personalized walkthrough.
contact.success: Thank you! Our team will reach out within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
contact.privacy: By submitting this form, you agree to our Privacy Policy. We respect your data and comply with GDPR and applicable privacy laws.

cookieConsent.title: Cookie Preferences
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site traffic. Under GDPR and applicable privacy laws, we require your explicit consent before setting non-essential cookies.
